header: The people who built it, working on your site

products.name: Installation & setup
products.description_text: The creators install, configure, and theme Desiderio for you — ship in days, not weeks.

products.name: Brand adaptation
products.description_text: A custom theme preset matched to your brand — WCAG 2.2-checked like the stock 15.

products.name: Custom element development
products.description_text: Per element: new Content Blocks built to the same audit rules as the stock 255.

products.name: Editor onboarding workshop
products.description_text: Half-day remote session: previews, the wizard, the Visual Editor, per-page themes.

products.name: TYPO3 LTS upgrade
products.description_text: Planned, executed, and regression-checked by the maintainers themselves.

products.name: Managed TYPO3 hosting
products.description_text: Updates, daily backups, monitoring, EU datacenter. Business at €179/mo adds staging, 99.9% SLA, CDN.
